## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style of the project
- [ ] I have commented non-obvious logic
- [ ] I have updated docs where relevant
- [ ] I did **not** commit any secrets, `.env`, `sessions/`, or media/logs
- [ ] Any attached screenshots contain **no** private feeds, DMs, or other
      users' content
